banner.title: AreaMatrix Dev Console
blocker.dirty: Blocker dirty worktree before checkpoint: git status --short
blocker.stale: Hint current task is stale; resume continues the same task.
clear_stale.confirm: Confirm clearing only stale in_progress records? This backs up progress.json first.
dashboard.boundary: Boundary: workflow is the planning lifecycle; live queue is still tasks/prompts; this screen does not write promotion output.
dashboard.title: AreaMatrix Dev Console
dashboard.workflow_text: planning only; does not modify task queue
dirty_continue.line1: Dirty worktree; the default Git checkpoint will block startup.
dirty_continue.line3: Manual commit or stash only saves the working state; it does not mark the task completed.
dirty_continue.line4: Only verify PASS lets task-loop move to the next task.
dirty_continue.run: Continue after cleanup: RISK_POLICY=allow MAX_RETRIES=1 ./task-loop run
drain.no_runner: No live runner is active; cannot request drain.
dry_run.done: Temporary dry-run finished; real progress/logs were not modified.
guard.live.line1: A live runner already exists; blocked starting a second runner.
guard.live.option_drain: ./dev drain   Request the current task to finish and checkpoint before stopping
guard.live.option_status: ./dev status  Show detailed status and logs
guard.quick_live.line1: A live runner is already active; cannot start another one.
guard.quick_live.line2: Use ./dev drain before shutdown so the current task can verify and checkpoint before stopping.
guide.after: After that: task-loop moves to the next task only after verify PASS.
guide.not_executed: No command was executed; this is a read-only recommendation guide.
guide.step.save_worktree: confirm changes belong to the current task; commit or stash to save state
guide.step.wait_drain: wait until the current task verifies/checkpoints and stops
guide.title: Recommended Action Chain
help.lines: - ./dev is the AreaMatrix Dev Console. Home is a situation diagnosis panel: is it safe, why, what action chain is next, and where v1 live queue and workflow planning stand.
- Home has four sections: Current Situation, Recommended Action Chain, Progress Overview, and Where To See More.
- The live queue still comes from tasks/prompts. workflow is the planning lifecycle and does not modify the live queue.
- Home entries: 1 recommended guide, 2 lifecycle map, 3 live queue details, 4 tools, ? shortcuts, h help, q quit.
- Enter shows full status only; it does not start tasks. 1 only shows the guide and does not execute commands.
- Language precedence: --lang > DEV_LANG > .codex/dev-console/config.json > mixed. Typing lang in interactive mode saves the repo-local preference.
- Type ? in interactive mode to show all shortcuts. Shortcuts come from the action registry.
- Dangerous actions are not on home; they live under live queue -> maintenance/danger and still require confirmation.
- stale resume is for shutdown, forced stop, or power-loss recovery; it does not skip to the next task.
- drain asks a live runner to finish the current task, verify, checkpoint, then stop.
- Git checkpoint defaults to commit; a dirty worktree blocks automatic checkpointing.
home.footer: Enter shows full status only; it does not start tasks. 1 opens the guide only. Dangerous actions live under live queue -> maintenance/danger.
home.meta: language: {mode}; type lang to persist; type ? for all shortcuts.
home.title: Where To See More
language.command_hint: You can also relaunch with: ./dev --lang mixed|zh|en
language.option.zh: Chinese UI; commands and paths stay untranslated
language.title: Language
lifecycle.init_hint: Preview a new version: ./dev workflow init --version v3; add --write explicitly to create files.
lifecycle.noninteractive_hint: Interactive mode can open version details by number; use ./dev workflow init --version v3 to preview a new version.
lifecycle.safe_actions: Safe actions (preview/doctor/status/write existing artifacts; no live queue writes):
lifecycle.safe_note: promotion defaults to preview; this round does not implement writes to tasks/prompts/**.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle Wizard
lifecycle.version_queue: local queue={local} | live queue={live} | live mapping={mapping}
pause.return: Press Enter to return to the menu...
preflight.title: Preflight
preview.live_runner: Note: a live runner already exists; this is only a preview and does not start another runner.
processes.title: Process Snapshot
progress_overview.title: Progress Overview
recovery.hint.blocked: - blocked exists: check the risk gate, then continue the specific task in allow mode.
recovery.hint.dirty: - Worktree is dirty; commit/push checkpoint mode will be blocked by the Git gate. Check git status first.
recovery.hint.failed: - failed exists: inspect the latest verify summary, then use ./dev resume-failed.
recovery.hint.live: - A live runner already exists; do not start another one. Use ./dev drain before shutdown.
recovery.hint.stale: - stale exists: prefer ./dev resume-stale to continue the same task.
recovery.hint.title: Recovery Hints
recovery.interruption.lines: 2. If the current task is stale:
4. If the runner is still active but you need to shut down:
Confirm those changes belong to the current task, then commit or stash.
Manual commit/stash only saves the working state; it does not complete the task.
Do not manually mark completed; only verify PASS lets task-loop move to the next task.
6. To continue until the current queue finishes:
reset.warning: Dangerous operation: this backs up and clears progress.json, starting from 0.
runner.task_logs: Detailed task logs still go to .codex/task-loop-logs/<run_id>/...
shortcuts.footer: language: {mode}; type lang to switch; 0/q/back returns from submenus.
shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
situation.reason.blocked: A blocked task exists; review the risk gate first.
situation.reason.dirty: Git checkpoint will be blocked by the dirty worktree.
situation.reason.failed: A failed task exists; repair the same task from the verify summary.
situation.reason.none: No console-level dirty/stale/failed/blocked blocker was found.
situation.reason.running: A live runner already exists; do not start a second runner.
situation.reason.stale: Current task {task} is stale, attempts={attempts}, and has not reached verify PASS.
situation.summary.safe: Safe: no console-level dirty/stale/failed/blocked blocker was found.
situation.title: Current Situation

--once                 Render one compact dashboard snapshot and exit
--refresh SECONDS      TUI refresh interval in seconds
